# Support

If you need help with Atheon, you have several options depending on what
you need and how urgent it is.

## 📚 Documentation

Start here for the vast majority of questions:

- [README](../README.md) — quick start and overview
- [docs/INSTALL.md](../docs/INSTALL.md) — installation matrix and tips
- [docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md](../docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md) — common problems
  and their fixes
- [docs/FAQ.md](../docs/FAQ.md) — frequently asked questions
- [docs/API.md](../docs/API.md) — public API reference
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) — system internals

These are kept up to date with each release. If a question is answered
there, you'll find the answer faster than asking.

## 💬 Community Discussion

For questions, design discussions, and general help:

- **GitHub Discussions** — open a thread under the matching category:
  *Q&A*, *Ideas*, *Show and tell*, or *General*. Use this for "how do
  I…" questions that the docs don't already answer.
- Search existing discussions before posting — many common questions
  have already been asked and answered.

## 🐛 Bug Reports

If you believe you've found a bug:

1. Search [existing issues](../../issues) to see whether it's already
   reported.
2. If not, open a new issue using the *Bug report* template — fill in
   every field so the maintainers have enough context to reproduce.
3. Include the Atheon version (`atheon --version`), the OS, and a
   minimal reproduction (input file, command, expected vs. actual).

## 🔒 Security Issues

**Please do not open a public issue for security problems.** Follow
the disclosure process in [.github/SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) instead.

## 📧 Direct Contact

There is no support email. Use GitHub Discussions for community help
and the SECURITY.md process for private disclosures. Issues filed
without the appropriate template will be redirected to Discussions.

## What to Expect

Atheon is an open-source project maintained by volunteers. There is
no SLA. Most questions are answered within a few days; bug fixes
follow the same cadence. If you need a guaranteed response window
for a business-critical use case, please sponsor the project or
contact the maintainers to discuss commercial support options.
